title: Project Corvus MPM addon
description: A MorePlayerModels resource pack which adds in more parts.
body:
MorePlayerModels resource pack that adds some new parts!!

i had lots of fun making all these parts for the initial release :D i would LOVE to compile every part i've made but that's quite the hassle with how much work i've done!! preview images has a good overview!!

feel free to edit and tweak models to your liking but PLEASE CREDIT ME!! thank youuu :333

MPM is not created by me, credit to Noppes!
MPM LINK: www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-player-models

![A close up screenshot of a minecraft player model with bug-like features. The captioned text reads 'download my thing'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2d9f4b980f9547758ad5b964944e02bfd2fb5185.png)
